creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
freeze-2.5_2 and mlt-0.8.0_1 both install /usr/local/bin/melt.
multimedia/mlt is marked as CONFLICT_INSTALL with freeze, but archivers/freeze
is not marked as CONFLICT_INSTALL with mlt.
If mlt has been installed first, freeze overrides this binary without any warning:

$ pkg_info -W /usr/local/bin/melt 
pkg_info: both freeze-2.5_2 and mlt-0.8.0_1 claim to have installed /usr/local/bin/melt

/usr/local/bin/melt was installed by package freeze-2.5_2

In order to get both ports installed together, /usr/local/bin/melt should be renamed in one of these ports.
